name: Aisha Rahman
comment: Velvet Paws transformed my cat Mochi's grooming experience. She came home looking like she'd been to a five-star spa. Absolutely incredible service!

name: James O'Brien
comment: The leather collar they custom-made for Max is a work of art. I get compliments every single walk. Worth every dirham!

name: Priya Nair
comment: Dr. Leila's nutrition consultation completely changed my dog's energy levels. Velvet Paws truly cares about your pet's wellbeing.
